abilities.description: When the engineer makes a move to craft, optimize, repurpose, modify, fix, or hack a piece of equipment or technology, add +1 and take +2 momentum on a hit. On a weak hit, they may press their luck. If they do, reroll all dice and add +2 (instead of +1).

When the engineer @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3782f1b3c8ca8b88]{Withstand Damage}, add +1. On a miss, they may attempt to reroute power or reboot critical systems. If they do, first @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-2). Then, reroll all dice and add +their wits instead of +integrity.

When the engineer @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.13b2d777c6fb719d]{Gathers Information} by studying a piece of technology or disassembling a machine or device, reroll any dice and take +1 momentum on a hit. When they make a move in combat by leveraging their engineering knowledge against a foe, envision how tey make use of this knowledge and add +1. On a strong hit with a match, mark progress.
